title: drosanthe scabra
side_effects: Drosanthe scabra can have side effects if used improperly, such as gastrointestinal issues, including diarrhea and stomach pain, due to its high concentration of saponins. Excessive consumption may also lead to allergic reactions, such as hives and itching, in some individuals. In rare cases, prolonged use of the plant's extracts can cause kidney damage and interact with certain medications, resulting in adverse health outcomes. Furthermore, improper handling and preparation of the plant can release toxic compounds, leading to respiratory problems and other systemic issues.
